description:
Final pass that closes out the .11.25 epic. By this point all deletions and moves are done; the remaining warnings are on items intentionally retained for downstream tickets. Annotate each with #[allow(dead_code, reason = "...")] pointing at its consumer ticket.

## Annotations

- src/ir_typer.rs:457 — specialize_return:
  ```
  #[allow(dead_code, reason = "tier-up hook; consumed by fz-ul4.19.5 per .24.7")]
  ```
  This cascades: widen, widen_map, widen_map_sig, widen_tuple, widen_list, widen_func in src/typer.rs become transitively reachable via specialize_return, so their warnings auto-clear.

- src/ast.rs:127 — MatchClause.span:
  ```
  #[allow(dead_code, reason = "consumed by fz-ul4.21 (lower error spans)")]
  ```

- src/ast.rs:255 — Item::Alias.span:
  ```
  #[allow(dead_code, reason = "consumed by fz-ul4.21 (resolve error spans)")]
  ```

- src/ast.rs:266 — Item::Import.span:
  ```
  #[allow(dead_code, reason = "consumed by fz-ul4.21 (resolve error spans)")]
  ```

- src/ast.rs:243 — FnDef.doc:
  ```
  #[allow(dead_code, reason = "consumed by fz-ul4.18.7 (@doc surface)")]
  ```

## Acceptance

- cargo build clean: 0 warnings.
- cargo test green.
- Close fz-ul4.11.25 via bw.

Blocked by: all of .11.25.1 through .11.25.6.
title: Final annotations: #[allow(dead_code)] with reasons for specialize_return + retained AST fields
